What is Earnesté?

A PLATFORM THAT
PAYS YOU BACK

Earnesté connects everyday Nigerians to multiple income streams — through phone activity, content creation, product reviews, digital skills, referrals, and more.

You don't need to be an expert to start. You just need to show up. Everything else is already built for you.

How It Works

SIMPLE.
STRAIGHTFORWARD.

Four steps. That's all it takes to get started on Earnesté.

01
📝

Register Your Spot

Fill in the form below. Your registration locks in your place before launch and gets you notified on WhatsApp the moment we go live.

02
💳

Pay Your Entry Token

Choose Regular (₦9,000) or VIP (₦15,000). Your entry token is what unlocks full access to every earning feature on the platform.

03
🔓

Access Your Dashboard

Log in on launch day. Every stream — tasks, reviews, Signal Flow, LiveVault, TikTok Reward — is live and waiting in your personal dashboard.

04
💰

Start Earning

Pick what works for you. Refer people, review products, create content, connect your number. Your earnings stack up. Daily.

Platform Features

EVERYTHING
EARNESTÉ OFFERS

📚 Digital Skills

Courses on Graphic Design, Web Development, Content Creation, YouTube Automation, TikTok strategy, and more. Taught by people who actually do it.

📡 Signal Flow

Connect your number. Telecom brands pay to understand phone usage — your everyday activity earns you a share. Up to ₦50k–₦100k monthly.

📱 Product Insight

Brands want real feedback from real users. Review phones, gadgets, and electronics you already use — ₦500 per honest review.

🎬 TikTok Reward

Create a video that stands out, win up to ₦50,000 that same day. You don't need to be famous — just creative. Best video wins, daily.

🔒 LiveVault Watch

Watch live streams like you normally do. Like, comment, share — earn Earnesté coins instantly. Convert to cash, airtime, or data.

🛒 Skill Marketplace

List what you can do — design, writing, photography, handiwork. Businesses hire through Earnesté and you earn ₦50k–₦100k for work you already know how to do.

👥 Add2Earn

Invite people into Earnesté's official groups and channels. Every new member you bring earns you rewards. Community-driven growth, and you're paid for it.

🌐 Opportunity Feed

Verified internships, grants, scholarships, paid fellowships, and career opportunities — all gathered in one place. More than a job board.

💼 Job Connect

Real Nigerian job openings across banking, tech, corporate, and entry-level roles. Verified, updated regularly, accessible from your dashboard.
